description: Very fast, very easy. I'm very satisfied. I jumped on board to help protect my data in my database and I ended up protecting, a bonus, my Gmail business suite.
author: Richard S.
pros: I'm gonna tell you what: this is very easy and simple to use. I went from "keeping me up at night" with how vulnerable I was... losing my data to being completely 100% at ease
cons: I'm going to tell you the truth. I haven't run into anything I don't like about this thing. Usually there is a drawback but I just can't find one. I am super satisfied.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experience in setting up and weekly assurance emails. Has all I need as I grow the business. The trial went well and was easy to convert. Setup was super easy and intuitive
author: Donald S.
pros: Very easy to use - easy set up and great dashboard. I receive weekly reminders that everything is under control - the right amount of reassurance without being bugged by too many alerts and emails . Easy to add other apps to the backups . Well priced .
cons: No issues - easy and intuitive. I haven't had anything to take issue with so far. So no cons to talk about
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I wouldn't recommend this product, extremely unprofessional and flawed product.
author: Javier G.
pros: Nothing, since it didn't work at all. Trying to restore a project gave me errors that support couldn't fix.
cons: Service was non-existent. Replied once to my request then ghosted me without fixing the issue.

description: Been with ProBackup since the early days, and it's been a great ride. No issues, support always replies, open to suggestions.
author: Miguel N.
pros: Peace of mind. All data backed up, synced with GDrive. Platform UI is so clean and easy to navigate. Just discovered that the platform almost mirrors our Apps UI. TOP
cons: All good. So far, ProBackup has exceeded my expectations. The team’s daily drive to keep improving the product sets a standard the competition should take seriously.

author: Eric M.
pros: ProBackup is incredibly easy to set up and get running - even for non-technical users. Once configured, it runs reliably in the background without requiring constant attention or manual intervention. For teams using Asana, it is an absolute must-have. The seamless integration ensures your project data is consistently protected, giving you peace of mind that nothing gets lost if something goes wrong.
cons: Honestly, there is very little to criticize here. ProBackup has performed consistently well across every use case I have encountered. I have not experienced any notable issues with reliability, configuration, or support. It simply works as advertised, which in today's software landscape is genuinely refreshing.

author: Patrick F.
pros: Easy to use and does what it should. Like the selection style and that we see that it worked. Good product.
cons: Only supports Google drive. We would like to have our own storage locally added to it. Or synology or FTP support or something like that.

author: Krzysztof Z.
pros: This is the best solution for backuping up Airtable data (including attachments). Just setup and relax. You can restore data in a certain point in time. It sends you reports about the amount data it backuped. And notifies you when there is an issue.
cons: We did not encounter any issues in the last two years we have being using this solution, so we don't have any negative points.

review_title: Essential peace of mind for my Airtable ecosystem.
description: ProBackup is a robust and reliable solution. It provides real peace of mind for any professional relying on cloud-based tools to run their business. Great value for the price.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The setup is incredibly straightforward. As an engineer, I highly value the reliability of their automated backups. It allows me to focus on my core business and automation workflows without worrying about data loss or human error in Airtable.
cons: The user interface could be a bit more modern, but the tool does exactly what it's supposed to do with high reliability, which is what matters most.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Thomas H.
pros: Great UI, it works and if not - you get notifications about the status. It has a clear structure and you can use it intuitvely
cons: Speed to load site could be a bit faster. but thats bothering not much. overall im happy with this backup addon for atlassian.

description: Very easy setup to backup Jira, Confluence and Trello. Good clear email communication regarding status of backups. Also good value for money.
author: Ivo R.
pros: Very easy setup to backup Jira, Confluence and Trello. Good clear email communication regarding status of backups. Also good value for money.
cons: We haven't discovered any serious issues yet. Everything works easily and as expected. For our purpose it offers everything we need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Aaron L.
pros: Set and forget. Reasonable price. No issues at all. Can see where the backups are and are being updated daily.
cons: It appears that while I was getting "Google Drive" backups under my previous plan, and could see them working, this wasn't grandfathered in when their plans changed, so I appear to have lost that feature. Not a huge issue for me.

review_title: Peace of mind for geeky tech stuff!
description: Customer service is exceptional - real people working with you to find solutions! Love that live chat is a person - not a bot!
author: Charlie C.
pros: Peace of mind, once I set up, it runs itself. I love that I get a weekly email, just peace of mind its all still running.
cons: The price has gradually crept up, which makes it tricky for small business with large amounts of data.

description: Happy with the reliability of the backups Gives peace of mind knowing that information is backed up safely
author: Sue D.
pros: Really helpful and easy to use. It works in the background without having to do anything. Used mainly for Asana.
cons: We currently do not have any issues using ProBackup. The product works well for our company needs with the service.

review_title: Would Recommend as a Podio Backup Solution
description: Will has been great to work with since the beginning of us engaging with his company many years ago. While backup systems are not exactly "exciting" with lots of fancy features to tout, it is reassuring to know that we have a contingency in place if someone accidentally deletes important data from our Podio system.
author: Joshua G.
pros: I like the "set it and forget it" nature of this product. It runs silently in the background protecting our important information.
cons: I do not have any complaints. Thankfully we haven't had to test out the platform in a real-life disaster recovery scenario, but I trust that it works.

review_title: Simple, Price Affordable, Option for Clickup Backup
description: Its been a great experience, simple to use, no connection issues, restores have worked great when needed.
author: Tony M.
pros: Ease of us was a big factor. We signed up, connected our Clickup Workspace and let 'er rip. Daily backups for piece of mind at a great price.
cons: Nothing really. It does exactly what its supposed to do. If I had to pick something, it would be the ability to migrate data from Clickup over to Asana, Jira, etc but that is not the purpose of this software anyway.

description: Works as promised. Constant improvements over time and fast support. After some time to get used to the UI the work with pro Backup is easy and works perfekt for us.
author: Johannes S.
pros: The customer support was always available. They also reached out for a feedback call where we discussed the needs of our company and process improvements.
cons: That the UI was not guiding me intuitiv to comments of lists and that the location of those information is not easy to access.

description: The support and product is good, and we can trust the security and integrity of our data with ProBackup. We do not need to compare products to have the best backup solution.
author: Conrad M.
pros: ProBackup was really easy to configure to safeguard our Podio backup data. The interface has been improved and the handling of bulk data volumes is very efficient.
cons: When working with large sets of data, it was sometimes hard to filter to exact records we wished to isolate for restoration.

review_title: Super easy and fast setup (less than 5 mins) -- works beautifully!
description: Easy and fast setup. Zero "maintenance" needed. Easy to restore data (which I've had to do twice due to deletion mistakes from co-workers). Absolutely love ProBackup!
author: Bryan B.
pros: Extremely easy and fast to set up. Very intuitive interface. Great way to get instant comfort of knowing data is backed up without needing any advanced technical skills. Using for Asana and Github. LOVING it!
cons: Needs to clarify that "restoring" data to Asana doesn't mean restoring the original projects/tasks. It means restoring a copy of the data, which is definitely helpful, but comes with important nuances that are critical for advanced users to understand -- e.g. @mentioned tasks and projects will now have new IDs. But, I don't see any better way to do it, and it gives enormous comfort knowing the data is preserved, so I'm a very happy customer nonetheless.

description: I tested ProBackup for a couple of weeks, everything is seamless, integration with the cloud, Ive tested all the restore options, it's flexible and working seamlessly.
author: Amos H.
pros: Ease of use, great support, great plans, retention options, seamless interface, integration with other apps in one dashboard.
cons: Restoring board option is missing :-), besides that I didn't find anything I didn't like. great interface, reports, and email alerts
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Finally handy tool for professional Asana back-up
author: Jan P.
pros: Fast implementation and easy to use. Finally, we have a professional backup of our data in Asana. My overall experience so far has been positive.
cons: After one month of use, I haven’t found any issues. Hopefully, it will stay that way in the future as well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I liked it. The peace of mind was really nice!
author: Jamie H.
pros: The peace of mind it gave me. If something happened to our ClickUp we would lose so much information and it's nice to know that we had a backup.
cons: I didn't like the spreadsheets I feel like it's hard to read. I would be cool if they fed into something similar to clickup that you could take notes or change statuses etc.

description: Asana doesn't have proper backups, they have JSON "takeout" which is clumsy and does not export all data. Pro Backup fixes that and is inexpensive (especially compared to Asana itself).
author: Aristarkh Z.
pros: It just works, point it to Asana installation and it grabs the data and backs it up. Especially good for the peace of mind is the ability to back up to Google Drive.
cons: While the UI is modern, it's not too intuitive. On the other hand, you set it up only once, so it's not much of a problem.

review_title: Pro Backup - Good for small businesses all way the up to the Enterprise
description: Speaking as a former CTO, who now runs a consulting business it gives me the power of the larger systems we used, without a significant configuration effort. I also advise my clients to use it.
author: Kevin S.
pros: - The weekly summary gives me positive verification the system is working - How easy it is to add online services to the backup - It's easy to understand the cost for backing up each online service
cons: I'd like to be able to see some details of the backup summary at mid level of detail. for example as I've been able to figure with Trello backups, the individual cards are shown , instead of first what boards were backed up, and then allowing you to go down to the card level.

review_title: Reliable Backup Solution with Excellent Support
description: My overall experience with Pro Backup has been excellent. It’s been incredibly reliable, and the security of knowing my work is backed up daily is invaluable. The support team is outstanding, and their proactive approach to updates and improvements ensures the service keeps getting better. As a long-term user, I feel confident in recommending Pro Backup to anyone looking for a dependable backup solution.
author: Gary D.
pros: What I like most about Pro Backup is its seamless integration with ClickUp, Asana, and other key tools I use. The daily backups provide peace of mind, knowing my data is secure, and I love the ease of restoring data when needed. The team’s support is also top-notch. They are responsive and genuinely helpful.
cons: One area that could be improved is the search functionality, especially when dealing with large data volumes. It can be challenging to find specific information quickly, and a more robust search option would enhance the user experience.

review_title: Finally a way to back up Airtable Bases
description: Backing up Airtable cloud data with Pro Backup is so easy and straightforward, it allows me to sleep much better now.
author: Markus W.
pros: The fact that I can now backup valuable Airtable data including bases and field formulas automatically and with ease is a dream come true.
cons: I think Pro Backup could do more to explain how one could access and restore data in case disaster strikes.
